status: RELEASED — endpoint LIVE + verified; build the branded form against this contract
summary: Replace the Microsoft Forms CTA on guidedailabs.com with a custom, on-brand intake form. Your BACKEND posts the submission server-side to the live Power Automate endpoint below; it creates a CRM record with full parity to the current Forms path. Keep the existing Forms CTA live as fallback until we jointly e2e the new form.
differentiationNote: The two brand forms share an IDENTICAL field set, order, and submission contract (so the CRM record shape is the same no matter which site a signal comes from). They DIFFER only in visual look & feel — match each form to its OWN landing page, do not make Labs look like Journey or vice versa. Your repo owns the authoritative design tokens/CSS for your brand; use them.

endpoint.url: <<live URL — delivered via X:\ DirectLink, not committed>>

headers.x-intake-secret: <<live secret — delivered via X:\ DirectLink, not committed>>

endpoint.secretHandling: CAPABILITY SECRET. Store the URL + x-intake-secret as SERVER-SIDE env vars/secrets only. NEVER ship them in client/browser code. The browser form posts to YOUR backend route; the backend adds the header and forwards to this URL. Rotation: ask the Windows side and we re-mint.
endpoint.response: HTTP 202 Accepted (fire-and-forget; the flow validates + creates asynchronously). Treat 202 as accepted. No synchronous per-field error; the guard silently drops invalid/bot submissions by design.

payloadContract.source: "Guided AI Labs"  (REQUIRED, exact string — drives IntakeSource; any other value is rejected by the guard)
payloadContract.needSummary: string (REQUIRED, non-empty) -> NeedSummary (+ used in Title)
payloadContract.situation: one of the 4 EXACT strings in situationChoices, or "" if skipped -> IntentPath column
payloadContract.consent: boolean true -> recorded as "Consent: I agree"
payloadContract.company: HONEYPOT — hidden field, must be empty. Bots that fill it are silently dropped.

situationChoices: Just me — I want to grow my own AI skills
My team — I want to build team capability
My organization — we need a broader AI strategy
Governance or policy — we need frameworks and oversight

formRequirements.fieldsAndOrder: IDENTICAL across both brands (do not diverge — this keeps the CRM record shape consistent): Full name, Email, Organization, What are you looking for (= needSummary), What best describes your situation? (= situation, the 4 choices), How did you hear about us, consent checkbox. Plus the hidden honeypot (company).
formRequirements.antiSpam: Secret (server-side) + honeypot only — no CAPTCHA (Adam decision). The honeypot field MUST be present, visually hidden, and validated empty.

designBrief.authoritativeSource: Use the guided-ai-labs-website repo's OWN design tokens / CSS variables / component library as the source of truth for colour, type, spacing, and button styling. Do not import Journey's palette.
designBrief.lookAndFeel: Match the current guidedailabs.com landing page. It has its own distinct feel from Journey (a slightly different look & feel by design — they are sibling brands, not the same skin). Mirror the Labs site's existing background treatment, accent colour, typography, and button shapes.
designBrief.logo: IMPORTANT: Guided AI Labs has NO logo / brand mark yet. Do NOT invent or borrow one. Use a clean TEXT WORDMARK ("Guided AI Labs") in the form header, and leave a clearly-marked logo slot/placeholder so a real mark can drop in later without reworking the layout.
designBrief.mood: Keep it consistent with the Labs site's positioning (practical, capability-building). Defer to the live site for the exact tone.

formRequirements.ux: On submit: an on-brand thank-you state; on network error, a friendly retry. Endpoint is fire-and-forget (202) so optimistically confirm success once the backend gets 202.

parityProof.verified: 2026-06-23 — server-side e2e BOTH brands: POST -> CRM item with correct IntakeSource, IntentPath, SignalType=Website, SignalStatus=New, provenance footer (Intake: custom site form). Guard negatives (bad secret / filled honeypot / invalid source) all blocked. 0 residue.
parityProof.note: The current Microsoft Forms path stays LIVE in parallel. Do NOT remove the existing CTA until we jointly verify the new form from a real browser.
